title: Ridda Wars Tribal Reincorporation Database (v2.0): 138 Events from al-Ṭabarī, al-Wāqidī, and al-Balādhurī
author: Gökalp, Hüseyin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Structured, geocoded database of 138 tribal reincorporation events during the Ridda Wars (11–12 AH / 632–633 CE), extracted from three classical Arabic chronicles using a Generative Information Extraction (GenIE) pipeline applied to the OpenITI digital corpus. Each event is classified as military subjugation (qitāl), voluntary submission (ṭāʿa), or mixed. Includes extraction pipeline code, validation materials, and Arabic lexical indicators.
steps_raw: Structured, geocoded database of 138 tribal reincorporation events during the Ridda Wars (11–12 AH / 632–633 CE), extracted from three classical Arabic chronicles using a Generative Information Extraction (GenIE) pipeline applied to the OpenITI digital corpus. Each event is classified as military subjugation (qitāl), voluntary submission (ṭāʿa), or mixed. Includes extraction pipeline code, validation materials, and Arabic lexical indicators.
keywords: Ridda Wars; early Islamic history; tribal reincorporation; al-Ṭabarī; al-Balādhurī; al-Wāqidī; database; digital Islamic humanities; Generative Information Extraction
